//: Tepna — Phase 4a machine-checked contracts (SIGNAL-ADAPTER-AND-FRONTIER brief). CI-ONLY: tsc --noEmit --checkJs. NO emit, NO shipped build, NO runtime dep — the 100%-local/offline invariant (CLAUDE.md §5.3) is untouched; TypeScript is a dev-time gate only. Scope is forward-first: only the clean CORE adapter layer is checked, NOT the legacy node *-dsp.js (those carry their own known DOM/localStorage debts, gated separately by the DSP-purity assertion, Phase 4b).
//d2: OWN-THE-BUILD-FOLLOWUPS §5 D.2 — widen this one module at a time, and NEVER blind: prove the module green with `npx -y -p typescript@5.5.4 tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json` (the exact pin types.yml runs) BEFORE adding it. Measured 2026-07-13 against this baseline: kernel-constants 0 (ADDED — needed no source edit) · clock 1 · metric-registry 2 · event-coupling 7 · dex-forget 8 · pulsedex-dsp 16 · glucodex-dsp 22 · cpapdex-dsp 27 · integrator-dsp 30 · ecgdex-dsp 31 · ppgdex-dsp 31 · hrvdex-dsp 46 · oxydex-dsp 107. NOTE clock.js and metric-registry.js are SHARED SPINE — inlined into every bundle — so editing either to satisfy tsc (clock's lone error is the `module.exports = root.DexClock` alias at :136) moves all 10 manifestHashes and churns every fixture. That is a deliberate fleet-churn decision, not a free widening. ADDED 2026-07-13 (all NON-bundled → zero manifestHash churn): event-coupling.js · dex-coload.js · provenance-banner.js — each `root.X = …` export cast via `/** @type {any} */ (root).X = …` (the IIFE-arg type wins over a @param, and `module.exports = X` poisons the `this` fallback), and event-coupling's Node-CLI `process` reached through `/** @type {any} */(globalThis).process`. nsrr-adapter.js (2 errs) DEFERRED — it references a bare `processNight` global (a runtime dependency oxydex-dsp doesn't export), not a type-only fix. ADDED 2026-07-13 (2nd pass): pulsedex-dsp.js — its 16 errors were ALL TS2304 for co-loaded globals (DexClock·DexExport·SignalFrame·dexScrubExport), so declaring them in `dex-globals.d.ts` (ambient, `any`) cleared it with ZERO source edit → NO re-bundle. KEY: a bundled *-dsp.js whose only errors are co-loaded-global TS2304 costs NOTHING (add the name to dex-globals.d.ts, no churn). Only real TS2339/property or DSP-reaches-render-sibling errors force a source edit + re-bundle. Remaining DSPs still carry those (glucodex 13·ecgdex 16·cpapdex 16·ppgdex 22·hrvdex 30·integrator 24·oxydex 90) — mixed TS2339 + render-sibling reach-ins (setStatus/UP/safeEl…), each a real fix, not a free add. ADDED 2026-07-13 (3rd pass): signal-orchestrate.js — 0 errors, zero source edit → NO re-bundle (it is inlined into Data Unifier.html / OverDex.html, but a tsconfig-include add never touches a bundle; same free class as kernel-constants.js). It is the shared UI-free node-orchestration middle (SIGNAL-ADAPTER-FOLLOWUPS §1), so gating it covers code two orchestrators depend on. FREE-DSP PATH NOW EXHAUSTED: re-measured every remaining *-dsp.js against this baseline — NONE is free. glucodex/ecgdex/cpapdex/ppgdex are pure TS2339/arithmetic (real fixes); integrator+oxydex mix TS2339+possibly-null; hrvdex is the closest (28 undefined-name + only 2 real TS2339 `.checked` on HTMLElement) BUT its undefined names are render-sibling app-layer helpers (setStatus/setProgress/rerender/getProfile/inferFromData/calcVo2Cat) — declaring THOSE as ambient `any` would mask the very DSP-reaches-render-sibling smell dex-globals.d.ts must NOT hide (it is for SHARED co-loaded spine only, not per-node render siblings), so hrvdex needs a genuine source edit (cast the two `.checked` reads to HTMLInputElement) + a re-bundle, not a free declaration. So the next DSP is a real behavioral-gate change, not a zero-churn add. ADDED 2026-07-13 (4th pass): hrvdex-dsp.js — the FIRST non-free (behavioral-gate) DSP. Three moves: (1) the 2 real TS2339 `.checked`-on-HTMLElement reads cast `/** @type {HTMLInputElement} */(el).checked` (comment-only → EXPORT-INERT: executed JS unchanged, fixture OUTPUT byte-identical); (2) genuine SHARED spine DexKernel (kernel-constants.js) + DexUnits (quantity.js) added to dex-globals.d.ts (same class as DexClock); (3) the per-node UI-sibling reach-ins (setStatus/setProgress/rerender/inferFromData/getProfile/calcVo2Cat — defined in hrvdex-app/render/profile.js) declared in a NEW, SEPARATE `hrvdex-globals.d.ts`, NOT dex-globals.d.ts — keeping the shared file spine-only (per the rule above) while documenting the DSP→UI coupling as node-specific debt (delete that file once the hrvdex UI files join the gate). Because a `.checked` cast is comment-only, the re-bundle is export-inert: HRVDex manifestHash moved 229842e56f9f→dafad1d5bb27 (and Data Unifier/OverDex, which co-load hrvdex-dsp.js, were re-bundled too) but every fixture OUTPUT hash is unchanged (GATE A + GATE B green; the real-recording hrvdex equiv leg is uploads-gated so it is SKIP here and in CI, same as every real-recording node). PATTERN for the remaining non-free DSPs (glucodex/ecgdex/cpapdex/ppgdex/integrator/oxydex): shared spine → dex-globals.d.ts, node UI siblings → a per-node <node>-globals.d.ts, real DOM/property errors → cast in source + re-bundle (watch the two orchestrators when the DSP is co-loaded).
